name: CloudPaw
description: CloudPaw plugin for QwenPaw — Alibaba Cloud deployment orchestration with ROS templates, multi-agent collaboration, Terraform integration, and ACP support.

description_i18n.zh-CN: QwenPaw 的云能力增强插件，融合 QwenPaw + 阿里云 CLI 与 ROS 资源编排。用自然语言完成从资源创建到应用部署的全流程。
description_i18n.en-US: CloudPaw plugin for QwenPaw — Alibaba Cloud deployment orchestration with ROS templates, multi-agent collaboration, Terraform integration, and ACP support.

author: CloudPaw Team
